title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd!
